1318:  * Short cache is an optimization which allows us to avoid step 3 most of the time
1319:  * when the data doesn't actually match. With short cache, the flow becomes:
1320:  *     1. Compute (hash, currentTag) at ip. currentTag is an 8-bit independent hash at ip.
1321:  *     2. Load (index, matchTag) from hashTable[hash]. See ZSTD_writeTaggedIndex to understand how this works.
1322:  *     3. Only if currentTag == matchTag, check *ip == *(base + index). Otherwise, continue.

1333:     size_t const hash = hashAndTag >> ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS;
1334:     U32 const tag = (U32)(hashAndTag & ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_MASK);
1335:     assert(index >> (32 - ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS) == 0);
